hero.heading: Your Pup Deserves to Look Pawfect
hero.subheading: Professional, gentle grooming services tailored to your furry best friend. We treat every dog like our own.

about.heading: A Salon Built with Love & Care
about.description_1: At Pawfect Grooming Studio, we believe every dog deserves to feel fresh, clean, and beautiful. Our experienced groomers treat every pup with patience, kindness, and expert care — because happy dogs make happy owners.
about.description_2: We use only pet-safe, eco-friendly products and keep our studio calm and stress-free so your furry friend always leaves with a wagging tail.

services.title: Bath & Blow Dry
services.description: A thorough, relaxing bath with premium shampoo and conditioner, followed by a gentle blow-dry that leaves your dog's coat soft and shiny.

services.title: Haircut & Styling
services.description: Breed-specific cuts or custom styles crafted by our expert groomers to make your pup look runway-ready every time.

services.title: Nail Trimming
services.description: Gentle and precise nail clipping to keep your dog comfortable and protect your floors. Includes a soothing paw massage.

services.title: Ear Cleaning
services.description: Safe and thorough ear cleaning to prevent infections and keep your pup's ears healthy, fresh, and irritation-free.

why_us.title: Breed-Specific Care
why_us.description: Every breed is different. We customize our approach for your dog's unique coat and temperament.

why_us.title: Safe Products Only
why_us.description: We use gentle, toxin-free, vet-approved shampoos and conditioners suitable for all skin types.

why_us.title: Flexible Scheduling
why_us.description: We work around your schedule with morning, afternoon, and weekend slots available.

why_us.title: Progress Updates
why_us.description: We send you cute photos and updates while your pup is getting pampered in our studio.

why_us.title: Transparent Pricing
why_us.description: No hidden fees, ever. Flat, honest pricing so you always know exactly what to expect.

why_us.title: Certified Groomers
why_us.description: All our staff are professionally certified with years of hands-on grooming experience.

contact.heading: Book an Appointment
contact.subheading: Ready to give your pup some well-deserved pampering? Fill in the form and we'll confirm your slot within 24 hours!
